architectureDecisions: Scout remains the local customer-owned Docker data plane.
Connectors write through the local Scout API or local adapter boundary where practical.
The local API contract is the stable upgrade seam and must hide backing storage choices from connectors.
Storage provider selection must support Scout-compatible storage, Enterprise/Fortress LanceDB/vector DB, pgvector companion storage, and local dual-write migration without connector rewrites.

Enterprise/Fortress owns canonical relationship-set analysis, attribution paths, outcome matching, comparable-example analysis, governed JSON handoff, and the proprietary Rust engine/vector DB boundary.
Elite sits above Fortress but does not change the customer-owned data-plane boundary.
Cloud controls licence, entitlement, artefact, download, update, registration, heartbeat, support, and safe aggregate metadata only.
Cloud must not receive customer data, vectors, embeddings, relationship sets, attribution paths, prompts, generated customer content, evidence packs, or derived customer intelligence.
openRisks: Scout does not currently persist canonical exact data items, relationship sets, attribution paths, outcome events, or vectors as first-class local storage.
Selector connectors are in-process fetchers and do not currently write canonical source records through the local REST API.
The older scout-n8n-node package appears to target a stale ingestion route.
Enterprise/Fortress live LanceDB and pgvector provider paths require explicit native-store proof and are not routine local checks.
pgvector write integration is documented as a placeholder in the audited private vector write seam.
A deterministic mapping from Scout tenant/workspace/user/source/fact IDs to Fortress postgres_pk/entity_type/layer/citation/provenance IDs is not implemented yet.
Replay or backfill through current Scout ingestion could trigger billing limits, duplicate suppression, recompute jobs, and normal audit telemetry unless a quiet local migration mode is added.
Cloud can gate entitlement and package access but must not receive raw data, vectors, evidence packs, relationship sets, attribution paths, or derived relationship intelligence.
Rollback needs concrete local scripts and proof criteria across Scout public storage, private Fortress storage, LanceDB/pgvector, and Cloud entitlement metadata.

realign or retire the stale packages/typescript/scout-n8n-node ingestion route
add local preflight and post-upgrade verification for Docker, database, backup, LanceDB, pgvector, embedding assets, tenant isolation, and governed JSON handoff
wire Cloud entitlement to local onboarding using only licence, artefact, version, channel, and safe config metadata
add focused tests and xhigh review gates before implementation is marked complete
